title: AST Warrant Arrest: Fairbanks [AK24117740]
summary: On April 20, 2025, at approximately 1913 hours, Fairbanks AST conducted a traffic stop at the intersection of 30th Avenue and South Cushman Street. The driver was identified as Dillon Miller. Dillon had an outstanding bench warrant. Dillon was arrested and remanded to FCC without incident.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

entities.address_detail: the intersection of 30th Avenue and South Cushman Street

title: AST Assault DV: Fairbanks [AK25037232]
summary: On 04/20/2025 at approximately 1803 hours, the Alaska State Troopers were dispatched to a domestic disturbance in Fairbanks. title: Public input opportunities on EO 14276
summary: In April 2025, the President issued Executive Order 14276 on Restoring American Seafood Competitiveness , which includes opportunities for public input in support of the EO’s policy. Input to the Council At the October Council meeting, the public will have the opportunity to provide additional comments on recommended actions to reduce the burden on...

title: AST Theft, DWSOL: North Pole [AK25037110]
summary: On 04/20/2025 at 0748 hours a Trooper conducted a traffic stop for an equipment violation. The driver, Wyatt Martin, was arrested for driving with a revoked license. A stolen pistol was recovered from the vehicle as well. This investigation is active.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Death Investigation: Fairbanks [AK25036770]
summary: On 04/19/2025 AST responded to a report of an individual that had passed away at a residence off Grenac Road. AST investigated the death and it was determined to be of natural causes. Stephen Cooper was the deceased. The state medical examiner released the body back to the guardian.

entities.address_detail: had passed away at a residence off Grenac Road

title: AST Driving Under the Influence ,: Fairbanks [AK25037082]
summary: On April 20th, 2025, at 0400 hours Shane Carroll was stopped for driving without lights and weaving on the Johansen Expressway. He showed signs of impairment during field sobriety tests and had a PBT result of .134 BrAC, later confirmed at .143 BrAC on the DataMaster. Two firearms were found in the....
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

charges: Misconduct Involving Weapons in the Fourth Degree
entities.address_detail: the Johansen Expressway

title: AST DUI/MIW4/MIW5: Fairbanks [AK25037037]
summary: On April 19, 2025, at approximately 2318 hours, Alaska State Troopers conducted a traffic stop on a silver Dodge Durango for traveling 85 MPH on the Richardson Highway in a posted 60 MPH zone. The driver identified as Brendon Dean Upton, was found to be driving under the influence of alcohol. During the stop, it was discovered that he was carrying a loaded semi-automatic handgun concealed on his person. As a result, Brendon was arrested and remanded to Fairbanks Correctional Center for DUI, and two counts of Misconduct Involving a Weapon.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

entities.address_detail: a silver Dodge Durango for traveling 85 MPH on the Richardson Highway in a posted 60 MPH zone

title: AST Disorderly Conduct: Fairbanks [AK25036989]
summary: On 04/19/25 AST in Fairbanks conducted a welfare check on a man walking in the roadway causing a hazard on University Ave in Fairbanks. A highly intoxicated Christopher Mann (32) was contacted and refused to exit the roadway. When the Trooper went to arrest Mann, he made a decision to run from the Trooper. The Trooper grabbed Mann and a struggled ensued and eventually Mann was placed under arrest. Mann began to resist while hand cuffed by kicking and then spit into a Troopers face. Mann was remanded at FCC for Disorderly Conduct, Harassment, and Resisting Arrest and held on 1000.00 cash bail.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

entities.address_detail: a man walking in the roadway causing a hazard on University Ave in Fairbanks
